name: Abgushte Miveh (Dried Fruit Soups)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean lamb or beef stew meat
1 lb Lamb or beef soup bones
1 to 2 Tbsp Lemon or lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into small cubes and place it in a soup pot with the bones, water, and dried lime if available.
2. Bring the mixture slowly to a boil, skimming when necessary.
3. Add salt and pepper; cover and simmer gently for 1½ hours or until the meat is almost tender.
4. Remove the bones and dried lime (if used).
5. In a frying pan, heat the ghee or butter and fry onion until transparent. Stir in turmeric and cook until lightly browned.
6. Add to the soup with the dried fruits (these may be washed if necessary, but do not require soaking). Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
7. Add sugar and lemon or lime juice to taste so that the soup has a pleasant sweet-sour flavor.
8. Serve hot.
